name: Grilled Portobello Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 3 large Fresh portobello mushrooms (stems removed and cleaned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the mushroom caps.
2. Place them on a broiler pan pre-coated with a little olive oil, bottoms up.
3. Cover the mushrooms with chopped garlic, salt, and freshly ground black pepper.
4. Drizzle half of the olive oil over the mushrooms.
5. Put under the broiler for about five minutes.
6. Remove the mushrooms and check for softness using a fork.
7. Sprinkle with chopped oregano and parsley.
8. Return to oven for another five minutes, checking every two minutes for perfect tenderness (soft on both tops and bottoms).
9. Serve hot as a main course with a vegetable-rice mixture.
Total calories per serving: 87
Fat: 8 g
Vegetarian
